metadata.note: EXPECTED-FAIL fixture (like the S-T2 backdoor fixture). This pact adds an interaction the provider does NOT implement — a real GET /v1/orders/{id} order-detail endpoint. The placeholder's catch-all answers 200 but the body has no order_id/status/total, so registryctl pact-verify MUST report a missing-key shape violation and exit nonzero. Proves 'breaking a published pact => provider build red'.

interactions.description: order detail — provider is MISSING this interaction
